response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with roughly 15 years across fullstack, backend, and platform work, including recent hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React product development and current AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic tooling) that directly matches a rare requirement. Strong testing culture (TDD, test frameworks authorship, workshops), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker), and database experience (MongoDB, MySQL, SQL) round out the core stack. Gaps are mostly framework-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest exposure, though adjacent experience suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep, current TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries
Broad architecture range from low-latency microservices to Kubernetes-deployed platforms and cloud (AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin absent and Java exposure appears dated/limited for the secondary stack
Career breadth spans many domains and languages (DLang focus for years), so recent depth in the exact primary stack needs probing
